generic-governance-template.notes: Full adoption review completed. Adopted: 3 new skills, investigation-first trigger, anonymous namespace guidance, Overlord checkpoint/workflow enhancements, agent README skills table + model guidance, PLANS.md investigation trigger. Discarded: naming conventions (camelCase), docstring format, directory layout, PIMPL, 4-sanitizer requirement, Conan/CMake4, #ifndef guards — all intentional particle-sim customizations.
